zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Oldfield於1523年出生在英國越可爾奧文登時，她的父親Christopher Oldefeld25歲，母親Margaret Mawde Le Bailly21歲。她於1547年6月13日與Richard Barstowe在英國越可爾奧文登結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年4月在英國越可爾諾萊安享年73歲，埋葬在英國越可爾諾萊安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Oldfield于1523年出生在英国越可爾奧文登时，她的父亲Christopher Oldefeld25岁，母亲Margaret Mawde Le Bailly21岁。她于1547年6月13日与Richard Barstowe在英国越可爾奧文登结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年4月在英国越可爾諾萊安享年73岁，埋葬在英国越可爾諾萊安。

nameMeanings.name: Oldfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived by ‘the old field’ (Middle English olde + feld) or who lived in a district that had been named in Old English as ‘the old open country’ (ald, feld). This is the source of placenames such as Allfield in Condover (Shropshire), Alfell Farm in Elmstead (Essex), Oldfield Grove in Langley (Essex), and several places in Cambridgeshire called (The) Offal, as well as many places called Oldfield in Yorkshire. Oldfield near Ludden Foot in Sowerby and another place so called in Honley, next to Meltham, are known to have given rise to hereditary surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Oldfield was born in 1523, in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England, her father, Christopher Oldefeld, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Mawde Le Bailly, was 21. She married Richard Barstowe on 13 June 1547, in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. She died in April 1596, in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Northowram, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Oldfield est née en 1523, à Ovenden, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Oldefeld, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mawde Le Bailly, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Barstowe le 13 juin 1547, à Ovenden, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1596, à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Oldfield 1523 in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Christopher Oldefeld 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mawde Le Bailly 21. Sie hat am 13. Juni 1547 in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England Richard Barstowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1596 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Northowram, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Northowram, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Oldfield è nata il nel 1523 nel Ovenden, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Christopher Oldefeld, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mawde Le Bailly, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Richard Barstowe il 13 giugno 1547, nel Ovenden, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1596, nel Northowram, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Northowram, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Oldfieldが1523年にイギリスヨークシュアイアオベンデンで生まれた時，父Christopher Oldefeldは25歳，母Margaret Mawde Le Baillyは21歳であった。1547年6月13日にイギリスヨークシュアイアオベンデンでRichard Barstoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年4月にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムで73歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Oldfield(이)가 1523년 영국 요르크실르 븐든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Oldefeld(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mawde Le Bailly(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1547년 6월 13일 영국 요르크실르 븐든에서 Richard Barstowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 4월 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Oldfield nasceu em 1523, em Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Oldefeld, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mawde Le Bailly, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Barstowe em 13 de junho de 1547, em Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1596, em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Oldfield родилась в 1523 г. в местности овенден, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Christopher Oldefeld было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mawde Le Bailly, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Barstowe 13 июня 1547 г. в местности овенден, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла апрель 1596 г. в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Oldfield nació en 1523, en Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Oldefeld, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Mawde Le Bailly, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Richard Barstowe el 13 de junio de 1547, en Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en abril de 1596, en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
